title: Tangy Crisp Algerian Cranberries Tagine
description: A flavorful and healthy Algerian-inspired dish featuring dried cranberries, perfect for a lazy Sunday meal. Wok-hei is achieved through the use of a bamboo steamer, resulting in a crisp texture.

ingredients.name: Algerian Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: can be substituted with a combination of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped red onion and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chopped cabbage and cook for 5 minutes, or until slightly wilted.
Add the sliced sweet potatoes, paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the dried cranberries, lemon juice, and water. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to medium-low and cover with a bamboo steamer.
Cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the sweet potatoes are tender and the liquid has reduced slightly.
Fluff the tagine with a fork and serve hot.
